'''Garthus Hal''' was a Human explosives expert and bomber for hire.

==Biography==
His early life included stints as a soldier, a pirate, and a gambler, but he soon became recognized for his skill in demolitions. With his reputation established, he went into business along with a small band of "lads," as he called them, as freelance bombers. Garthus had no scruples and hired himself out equally to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], or to various terrorist factions, whoever could afford his services. He became infamous working for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Jander Graffe]], who hired him to commit terrorist acts on the planet [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] in the name of the Rebellion, including one bombing at the [[Togatto Speedway/Legends|Togatto Speedway]] that killed many popular racers.
